Related Entities

  • hospital FREDERICK HEALTH HOSPITAL 3-star overall rating
  • snf AUTUMN LAKE HEALTHCARE AT BALLENGER CREEK 2-star, 130 beds
  • snf CITIZENS CARE AND REHABILITATION CENTER OF FREDERI 4-star, 170 beds
  • snf FREDERICK CROSSING OF JOURNEY 3-star, 120 beds
  • snf AUTUMN LAKE HEALTHCARE AT BRADDOCK HEIGHTS 5-star, 65 beds
  • snf NORTHAMPTON MANOR NURSING AND REHABILITATION CENTE 1-star, 196 beds
  • snf HOMEWOOD LIVING FREDERICK 5-star, 120 beds
  • snf AUTUMN LAKE HEALTHCARE AT GLADE VALLEY 2-star, 124 beds

Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
